subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him. His is the grandeur and the majesty, His the might and the power and the transcendent dominion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو له العظمه و الکبریاء و له القدره و القوه و الاستعلاء
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @mystical themes, @transcendence; unknowability of God
